description: For the man who is smart enough to prefer quality along with a sporty feel, this pair from red tape is the right choice. Wear this with washed black jeans from wrangler and your favourite T-shirt, a perfect off-duty ensemble to wear for a coffee date in the evening. Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrasting overlay lining along the midfoot Stitched detailing on the toe box, midfoot and collar Central lacing system Padded tongue for comfort Padded sockliner Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured grooves in a circular pattern for greater grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Use a suede brush to dust suede surface Do not store in direct sunlight
